import pandas as pd

# Sample DataFrame creation
data = {
    'Patient ID': [1, 1, 1, 2, 2, 3],
    'age': [30, 30, 30, 45, 45, 60],
    'sexuality': ['M', 'M', 'M', 'F', 'F', 'M'],
    'procedure type': ['A', 'A', 'A', 'B', 'B', 'C'],
    'minute_1': [1, 0, 0, 1, 0, 1],
    'minute_2': [0, 1, 0, 0, 1, 0],
    'minute_3': [0, 0, 1, 1, 0, 1],
    'minute_4': [1, 0, 0, 0, 1, 0],
    'minute_5': [0, 1, 0, 1, 0, 1],
    'minute_6': [0, 0, 1, 0, 1, 0],
    'minute_7': [1, 0, 0, 1, 0, 1],
    'minute_8': [0, 1, 0, 0, 1, 0],
    'minute_9': [0, 0, 1, 1, 0, 1],
    'minute_10': [1, 0, 0, 0, 1, 0]
}

df = pd.DataFrame(data)

# Reshape the DataFrame
melted_df = df.melt(id_vars=['Patient ID', 'age', 'sexuality', 'procedure type'], 
                     value_vars=[f'minute_{i}' for i in range(1, 11)], 
                     var_name='time', value_name='value')

# Filter out rows where value is 0
filtered_df = melted_df[filtered_df['value'] == 1]

# Create a new column for "Time since operating room"
filtered_df['Time since operating room'] = filtered_df['time'].str.extract('(\d+)').astype(int)

# Drop the 'time' column
final_df = filtered_df.drop(columns=['time', 'value'])

# Sort by Patient ID and Time since operating room
final_df = final_df.sort_values(by=['Patient ID', 'Time since operating room']).reset_index(drop=True)

# Display the final DataFrame
print(final_df)

import pandas as pd

# Sample DataFrame creation
data = {
    'Patient ID': [1, 1, 1, 2, 2],
    'age': [30, 30, 30, 45, 45],
    'sexuality': ['M', 'M', 'M', 'F', 'F'],
    'procedure type': ['A', 'A', 'A', 'B', 'B'],
    'minute_1': [1, 1, 1, 0, 0],
    'minute_2': [0, 0, 0, 1, 1],
    'minute_3': [1, 1, 1, 0, 0],
    'minute_4': [0, 0, 0, 1, 1],
    'minute_5': [1, 1, 1, 0, 0],
    'minute_6': [0, 0, 0, 1, 1],
    'minute_7': [1, 1, 1, 0, 0],
    'minute_8': [0, 0, 0, 1, 1],
    'minute_9': [1, 1, 1, 0, 0],
    'minute_10': [0, 0, 0, 1, 1],
}

df = pd.DataFrame(data)

# Reshape the DataFrame
melted_df = df.melt(id_vars=['Patient ID', 'age', 'sexuality', 'procedure type'], 
                     value_vars=[f'minute_{i}' for i in range(1, 11)], 
                     var_name='time', value_name='value')

# Extract minute number and create 'Time since operating room' column
melted_df['minute'] = melted_df['time'].str.extract('(\d+)').astype(int)
melted_df['Time since operating room'] = melted_df['minute'] - 1

# Filter only rows where value is 1
final_df = melted_df[melted_df['value'] == 1]

# Drop unnecessary columns
final_df = final_df[['Patient ID', 'age', 'sexuality', 'procedure type', 'Time since operating room']]

# Sort by Patient ID and Time since operating room
final_df = final_df.sort_values(by=['Patient ID', 'Time since operating room']).reset_index(drop=True)

# Output the final DataFrame
print(final_df)

import pandas as pd

def transform_dataframe(df):
    # Melt the dataframe to have one row for each patient id and chromatography hour
    melted_df = df.melt(id_vars=['Patient', 'Years', 'Sex', 'Activity', 'Routine', 'Eccentric'],
                        var_name='Chromatography_Hour', value_name='Value')
    
    # Extract hour from the chromatography column
    melted_df['Hour'] = melted_df['Chromatography_Hour'].str.extract('(\d+)').astype(int)
    
    # Group by Patient and Hour, and aggregate the values
    grouped_df = melted_df.groupby(['Patient', 'Years', 'Sex', 'Activity', 'Routine', 'Eccentric', 'Hour'])['Value'].apply(list).reset_index()
    
    # Rename the columns for clarity
    grouped_df.rename(columns={'Hour': 'Time since operation'}, inplace=True)
    
    # Sort the dataframe by Time since operation
    grouped_df.sort_values(by='Time since operation', inplace=True)
    
    return grouped_df
